content: Remote OK Scrum Master Ringside Talent <p>We are looking for a <strong>Scrum Master </strong>to work for our client. The ideal candidate aligns with the responsibilities and qualifications outlined below.</p><p><br></p><p>This role is ideal for an experienced Scrum Master who thrives in a collaborative, fast-moving Agile environment. Youâll play a key role in guiding teams, improving delivery processes, and fostering a culture of continuous improvementâall while supporting distributed teams across Ohio in a fully remote setting.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li>Facilitate Agile ceremonies, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives</li><li>Serve as a coach and mentor to Agile teams, promoting Scrum best practices and continuous improvement</li><li>Remove roadblocks and help teams maintain focus on sprint goals and deliverables</li><li>Partner with Product Owners to manage backlogs and ensure readiness of work</li><li>Track and report on team performance metrics (velocity, burndown, etc.)</li><li>Foster a culture of accountability, transparency, and collaboration</li><li>Support Agile transformation initiatives across teams and departments</li><li>Coordinate with stakeholders to ensure alignment and successful delivery</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>3â6+ years of experience as a Scrum Master or Agile Coach</li><li>Strong knowledge of Scrum principles and Agile methodologies</li><li>Experience supporting cross-functional software development teams</li><li>Excellent facilitation, communication, and conflict resolution skills</li><li>Experience using Agile tools (Jira, Azure DevOps, or similar)</li><li>Scrum certification (CSM, PSM, or equivalent) preferred</li><li>Ability to work effectively in a remote, distributed team environment</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>What Our Client Offers</strong></p><ul><li>Competitive compensation and professional development opportunities</li><li>A flexible, remote-first work environment</li><li>A collaborative culture focused on team success and innovation</li><li>Opportunity to influence Agile maturity and team effectiveness</li><li>Supportive leadership and strong cross-functional teamwork</li></ul><p></p> exec, consulting, designer Ohio, Ohio, United States 2026-05-28T03:48:23+00:00 1132429 operations across marketing, ecommerce, wholesale, and internal project management.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span>We are a small but growing team, so this role is ideal for someone who thrives in a startup environment, enjoys wearing multiple hats, and can help bring structure, organization, and follow-through to a fast-moving business.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span>This person will work directly with the founder and internal team to help keep projects moving, priorities organized, and departments aligned.</span></p><p><br></p><p><strong>What Youâll
